name: MoneyGram
description_short: Pittsburgh, PA's MoneyGram at 242-250 Fifth Ave offers check-cashing and money transfer services, open daily 7AM-7PM.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates a standalone branch at 242-250 Fifth Ave in downtown Pittsburgh, PA. This location is open daily from 7AM to 7PM, seven days a week, providing consistent access to financial services for Pittsburgh residents.

At this Pittsburgh location, services include check-cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and other money services. To confirm specific services or account details, contact the branch directly at +1 800-746-7287.

If you live in Pittsburgh and need to cash a check or transfer money quickly, bring a valid government-issued ID and any relevant payment information. This branch offers a fast alternative for time-sensitive financial needs.
pros: Extensive location network with 19 Pittsburgh-area locations making physical access convenient for many residents
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, CVS) and established check-cashing chains (Ace Cash Express) increases accessibility
Extended business hours at most locations, with many open until 8-10 PM for after-work transactions
Hybrid service model allows customers to manage transfers online or offline depending on preference
No requirement to maintain a bank account to use basic money transfer services
Simple, straightforward service focused specifically on money transfers without upselling other financial products
cons: Service availability dependent on partner location hours and operations—if a partner closes, that service point disappears
Website does not display pricing, fees, or exchange rates, making it impossible to evaluate cost-competitiveness
Limited ability to contact MoneyGram directly; customers must call individual partner locations
No information provided about transfer speed, limits, or international service availability from the website
Service quality and customer experience may vary significantly between different partner locations
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need physical locations to conduct money transfers
People sending money domestically who prioritize convenience and extended hours over online-only options
Customers already shopping at Walmart or visiting CVS who want to combine errands with money transfer
Consumers in Pittsburgh looking for accessible money transfer options without opening a bank account
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those without reliable online access who need convenient physical locations for domestic money transfers. The primary caveat is that actual pricing, fees, speed guarantees, and international capabilities are completely absent from their website, requiring customers to call individual partner locations for details—a significant friction point in the customer evaluation process.
services: Domestic money transfers (send money between US locations)
In-person money receiving at partner locations
Online money transfer initiation with in-person pickup
Service access through Ace Cash Express partner locations
Service access through CVS pharmacy locations
Same-day or next-day transfer options (implied by 'easy' transfers)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 242-250 Fifth Ave, Pittsburgh, PA. Check-cashing and money transfers open 7AM-7PM daily.
